rationale: The cited paper is used as a core source study for the alliance longitudinal dataset that the 2008 article analyzes in its cross-sectional versus longitudinal comparison. It is referenced in the data description and table documentation as part of the empirical basis for the paper's validity tests, not just as general background. The citing paper also uses the 2003 study as a concrete example in its causal-inference discussion (within-subject longitudinal design reducing alternative explanations).
relation_description: The citing paper treats Rindfleisch and Moorman (2003) as an empirical foundation by drawing on that alliance study's longitudinal data context in its methodological illustration. It also uses the 2003 article as an example of how longitudinal within-subject designs can strengthen causal interpretation.
